message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam roundcorner 10

class KinematicModelClient <<C>> {
  updateKinematics(): void
}

class RoutePlanningClient <<C>> {
  updateRoute(): void
}

class PositionSensor <<C>> {
  position: Position
  resourceId:int = 1
  --
  getPosition(): struct Position
  setPosition(p: struct Position): void
  lockDyadic(): int
  releaseDyadic(): void
}

class VelocitySensor <<C>> {
  velocity: Velocity
  resourceID:int = 2
  --
  getVelocity(): struct Position
  setVelocity(p: struct Position): void
  lockDyadic(): int
  releaseDyadic(): void
}

class AltitudeSensor <<C>> {
  alttitude: Altitude
  resourceID:int = 2
  --
  getAltitude(): struct Position
  setAltitude(p: struct Position): void
  lockDyadic(): int
  releaseDyadic(): void
}

class ResourceList <<C>> {
  rIDList: int rIDList[20]
  nIDs: int = 0
  --
  isInOrder(rID:int):char
  addLock(rID:int):int
  removeLock(rID:int):void
}

class Mutex <<C>> {
}

KinematicModelClient --> PositionSensor
KinematicModelClient --> VelocitySensor
KinematicModelClient --> AltitudeSensor

RoutePlanningClient --> PositionSensor
RoutePlanningClient --> VelocitySensor
RoutePlanningClient --> AltitudeSensor

PositionSensor --> ResourceList
VelocitySensor --> ResourceList
AltitudeSensor --> ResourceList

PositionSensor --> Mutex
VelocitySensor --> Mutex
AltitudeSensor --> Mutex

ResourceList --> Mutex
@enduml
